name: dev-lifecycle
title: 开发全流程编排
description: 编排 project-init、dev-spec、git-flow、ci-trigger 四个 skill，实现项目级 scaffold → feature 级 spec/code/ci 的可中断恢复开发流程；状态分两层：项目级 .dev-flow/project.json（scaffold phase）与 feature 级 .dev-flow/states/<feature>.json（per-feature 并行，活动指针以当前分支为准同步）；GUI merge 是默认关闭的可选辅助能力。Orchestrate project-level scaffold and feature-level spec/code/ci with two-layer state, per-feature parallel state, branch-authoritative active pointer, and optional GUI merge fallback.
